I'm going to include them always -- it does not hurt, and who knows, which=
=20
compiler the user is using anyway.

Ullrich, is there a good reason to support the "included gettext" (INCGT)=20
option? I'd like to eliminate it completely, just as the bundled boost is=20
eliminated...
